message: I think BLG is more likely to win because recent form is stronger.

Direction: YES. As of May 17, 2026, Spirit look like the stronger side: they went 3-0 in the PGL Astana Swiss stage and then crushed MOUZ 13-3, 13-2 in the semi, while Falcons dropped a Swiss match to 9z and had a shakier playoff path. Strongest evidence: Spirit also beat Falcons 2-0 on April 18, 2026 at IEM Rio, and their current form in Astana has been cleaner overall. Confidence: 62%. Main risk: Falcons still have elite firepower and m0NESY is in explosive form, so a hot start or strong veto in a BO5 could swing the series.
